title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank Global Group - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Bank Global Group - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the HDFC Bank Global Group family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!
